title: Incorrect handling of `x` in if blocks (`if (x) else` ) ?

features.name: if-else with x-valued condition
features.description: Code should include an if-else block where the condition evaluates to x (unknown value) and the else branch contains a non-blocking assignment

features.name: negation of x-valued signal
features.description: Code should include a unary NOT operator applied to a signal that has an unknown (x) value

features.name: non-blocking assignment in clocked always block with x-driven condition
features.description: Code should include a non-blocking assignment in an always @(posedge clk) block where the condition driving control flow derives from an x-valued signal
